final_prompt.prompt:
Create a banner news/viral social-media image for Weibo (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "新闻纪实感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Magnum Photos documentary tradition, 1990s Hong Kong urban photography, contemporary street photography (Alex Webb); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide 16:9 banner format, horizontal expanse with ample negative space for text overlay
Subject: must include city skyline at dusk with pedestrians in motion, distant high-rise buildings reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: must include urban cityscape at dusk, neon lights beginning to illuminate, dramatic light-shadow contrast
Lighting/mood: needs a dusk atmosphere with dramatic chiaroscuro — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a sunset-to-neon transition direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: needs an 8K-quality realistic surface treatment — exact grain / sharpness is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, prominent, Heiti or modern sans-serif), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or bottom-right)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio, horizontal layout with ample text-safe negative space
Avoid: must avoid overly staged or artificial-looking scenes
